skill.name: docusign-automation
skill.description: Automate DocuSign tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): templates, envelopes, signatures, document management. Always search tools first for current schemas.
skill.summary: Automate DocuSign e-signature workflows via Rube MCP - manage templates, create envelopes, track signatures.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a documentation skill that provides guidance for using the DocuSign API via Rube MCP (Composio). The static scanner flagged backtick characters in markdown as 'shell execution' - these are false positives as they represent code formatting, not actual execution. The network URL at line 22 is a legitimate MCP server endpoint. No security risks identified.

content.value_statement: Automate e-signature workflows by using DocuSign templates, creating envelopes, and tracking signing status through an MCP integration.
actual_capabilities: List and browse available DocuSign templates
Create envelopes from templates with recipient assignments
Send envelopes for signature or save as drafts
Monitor envelope status and recipient signing progress
Add templates to existing draft envelopes
limitations: Requires active Rube MCP connection with DocuSign toolkit
Cannot create templates - only use existing ones
Rate limited by DocuSign API per-account limits
OAuth authentication must be completed manually

use_cases.title: Send contracts for e-signature
use_cases.description: Create and send contract documents from templates to clients for signature

use_cases.title: Automate onboarding document signing
use_cases.description: Streamline employee or vendor onboarding with pre-defined document templates

use_cases.title: Track document signing status
use_cases.description: Monitor pending signatures and follow up on outstanding documents

prompt_templates.title: List available templates
prompt_templates.prompt: List all available DocuSign templates using the skill.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to see what document templates are available in their DocuSign account

prompt_templates.title: Send document for signature
prompt_templates.prompt: Create and send an envelope from the 'Sales Contract' template to john@example.com with name 'John Smith' and role 'Signer'.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to send a specific template to a recipient

prompt_templates.title: Check envelope status
prompt_templates.prompt: Check the status of envelope ID '12345678-abcd-1234-efgh-123456789012'.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to track the signing progress of a sent document

prompt_templates.title: Create draft and send later
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a draft envelope from the 'NDA Template' template with role 'Party A' assigned to 'Jane Doe' at jane@example.com.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to prepare an envelope but send it manually later

output_examples.output:
Available templates:
- Sales Contract (ID: abc123...)
- NDA Template (ID: def456...)
- Employee Offer Letter (ID: ghi789...)

output_examples.input: Create and send envelope from 'Sales Contract' template
output_examples.output:
Envelope created successfully!
- Envelope ID: env_12345
- Status: sent
- Recipients: 1 pending signature

Envelope Status: delivered
- Sent: 2024-01-15T10:30:00Z
- Delivered: 2024-01-15T10:35:00Z
- Recipients: 1/1 signatures pending

best_practices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before making calls
Verify connection status shows ACTIVE before running any DocuSign workflows
Store envelope IDs immediately after creation for tracking
anti_patterns: Hardcoding template or envelope GUIDs - always resolve IDs from API responses
Sending envelopes without verifying recipient email addresses are valid
Ignoring rate limits when bulk creating envelopes

faq.question: Do I need a DocuSign account?
faq.answer: Yes, you need an active DocuSign account with API access and must complete OAuth authentication via Rube MCP.

faq.question: Can I create new templates with this skill?
faq.answer: No, this skill uses existing templates. Template creation must be done in the DocuSign web interface.

faq.question: What happens if a recipient declines to sign?
faq.answer: The envelope status will change to 'declined' and you can retrieve details about the declination from the envelope response.

faq.question: Can I void a sent envelope?
faq.answer: Yes, but voiding notifies all recipients. Sent envelopes cannot be unsent, only voided.

faq.question: How do I know when all parties have signed?
faq.answer: Check the envelope status - it will show 'completed' when all recipients have signed.

faq.question: What is Rube MCP?
faq.answer: Rube MCP is a middleware service by Composio that provides MCP server access to various tools including DocuSign.
